name: aicraw
description: AI 个人助理 - 支持钉钉、飞书、QQ 等多端接入
author: LinClaw Team

scripts.build:electron: node scripts/sync-icons.mjs && node scripts/check-python-dist.mjs && vite build --config vite.electron.config.ts && electron-builder
scripts.build:electron:mac: MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=14.0 node scripts/sync-icons.mjs && node scripts/check-python-dist.mjs --target=darwin && vite build --config vite.electron.config.ts && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:electron:mac:arm64: MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=14.0 node scripts/sync-icons.mjs && node scripts/check-python-dist.mjs --target=darwin && vite build --config vite.electron.config.ts && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.build:electron:mac:x64: MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=14.0 node scripts/sync-icons.mjs && node scripts/check-python-dist.mjs --target=darwin && vite build --config vite.electron.config.ts && electron-builder --mac --x64
scripts.build:electron:win: node scripts/sync-icons.mjs && node scripts/check-python-dist.mjs --target=win32 && vite build --config vite.electron.config.ts && electron-builder --win

mac.identity: Shanghai Qiniu Information Technologies Co., Ltd. (W2TP34G2MM)
